posts.author: dastogroup (Terry)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Add the ability to switch or select different pricing columns when creating quotes and invoices, without changing templates or affecting invoice numbering.

What are you trying to achieve

I want to use one invoice/quote template for multiple clients who each have different pricing. The goal is to quickly select the correct pricing set per client, avoid duplicate templates or manual price edits, and keep invoice numbering intact.
